chain.thought: Explanation: The only two stations noted as being in both “Area 1” and “Area 2” (interpreted as AM and FM) at the same time are those that “retained call” when moving to FM: 7nt (Launceston) and 7qn (Queenstown). Therefore, their areas are Launceston and Queenstown.

- Row 8: 7qn, area served: queenstown, fate: “moved to fm in 1991, retained call”

These entries demonstrate the two stations that maintained their identity across both setups at the same time, and their areas are launceston and queenstown. This aligns with the Prediction Answer: launceston|queenstown.
